use_cases: Display hierarchical FAQ sections with expandable subcategories
Organize documentation content with nested collapsible sections
Present company information with categorized, drill-down content
Create structured product or service catalogs with detailed sub-items
Build multi-level navigation menus for knowledge bases
ai_summary: A multi-level accordion component that combines shadcn's Accordion and Collapsible primitives to create nested, expandable content sections. Features categorized items with icons, color-coded backgrounds, and collapsible sub-content. Ideal for organizing hierarchical information like FAQs, documentation, or organizational overviews with clean, accessible expand/collapse behavior.
